chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تُكْرَهُ مُعَامَلَتُهُ وَ مُخَالَطَتُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The ones with whom dealings and inter-mingling is abhorred

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تُعَامِلْ ذَا عَاهَةٍ فَإِنَّهُمْ أَظْلَمُ شَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from a number of our companions, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Husayn Bin Kharjat, from Maysar Bin Abdul Aziz who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Do not have dealings with the ones with deformities, for they are the most unjust ones’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu ‘Abd Alfah, from his father from Fadf al- Nawfafiy from ibn abu Yahya al-Raziy who has said the fofiowing: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not intermingle or form contract with anyone except those who are established in goodness.’”
